text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 213 

PRE_ICL_DAYS_INNPP_1M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Split Network Standard Retail — Number of Days in One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in a one-month supply of a drug on this tier, when using an 
in-network non-preferred pharmacy (INNP; also known as a standard retail pharmacy within a split 
network P) during the pre-initial coverage limit
